name: Cheese Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the grated cheddar cheese, flour, margarine or butter, salt, paprika, and cayenne pepper until combined.
2. Gradually add water to form a dough. If the dough is too dry after rolling, brush the tops with water before salting.
3. Roll out the dough into a rectangle about 1/2 inch thick.
4. Cut the rolled dough into small squares or rectangles, approximately 1/2 inch apart, using a plastic knife.
5. Place the crackers on a baking sheet and bake at 425°F (220°C) for 5 minutes or until lightly browned.
This recipe yields about one dozen crackers, but you can make more by covering a larger baking sheet with the cut dough pieces. After baking, toppings such as coarse salt, garlic salt, celery salt, curry powder, or freshly ground black pepper can be added.
